global.description: The ad features a modern design with geometric shapes and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure payment service with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and fresh look.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, are outlined in a lighter shade, creating a modern design element.

elements.label: Small shape
elements.description: A small, faintly outlined shape positioned towards the bottom center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple' is prominently displayed in bold, white font, with a smaller line below stating 'No hidden fees'.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: The 'NovaPay' logo appears in a bold, modern font at the top left, colored in white for contrast.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright yellow button at the bottom center with the text 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, contrasting color, drawing attention.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, secure payment service, geometric shapes
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Secure & simple, No hidden fees, NovaPay, Claim reward, SALE
